title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at IKEA India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at IKEA India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
IKEA India Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About IKEA India Digital Technologies:
IKEA India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IKEA India Digital Technologies!
